alternateCalendars.label: Early/Middle College and Academies Academic Calendar 2026-2027

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Guilford County Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Guilford County Schools is Monday, August 24, 2026. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Guilford County Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Guilford County Schools is Thursday, June 10, 2027. The school year runs from August through June, covering 185 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2026-2027 for Guilford County Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Guilford County Schools runs March 22–26, 2027 — a full week off, one week earlier than the 2025–2026 window. Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools breaks March 29–April 2, one week after GCS, so there is no common break window between the two districts this year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2026-2027 for Guilford County Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Guilford County Schools runs December 21, 2026–January 1, 2027, a total of 12 days. A teacher workday falls on January 4, so students return Tuesday, January 5, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving break 2026-2027 for Guilford County Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for Guilford County Schools runs November 25–27, 2026 (Wednesday through Friday). Thanksgiving Day falls on November 26. School resumes Monday, November 30, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break Shifts Earlier
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break moves from Mar 30–Apr 3 (2025–2026) to Mar 22–26, pulling the break about one week earlier. Charlotte-Mecklenburg breaks the week after (Mar 29–Apr 2), so GCS and CMS families have no shared break window.

yearNumbers.label: 12-Day Winter Break
yearNumbers.detail: Winter Break runs December 21–January 1 — 12 days off. A teacher workday falls on January 4, so students return Tuesday, January 5, 2027.

yearNumbers.label: 7 Teacher Workdays
yearNumbers.detail: GCS schedules 7 teacher workdays in 2026–2027 when students do not attend: Sept 21, Oct 30, Nov 3, Jan 4, Jan 25, Feb 15, and Apr 5. Add these to your personal calendar separately from the main break windows.

yearNumbers.label: 185 Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: Guilford County requires 185 instructional days — 5 more than the North Carolina state minimum of 180, adding a full extra week of school compared to minimum-compliance districts.

calendarNotes: Guilford County Schools begins the 2026–2027 school year on August 24, 2026. The calendar includes seven teacher workdays (Sept 21, Oct 30, Nov 3, Jan 4, Jan 25, Feb 15, Apr 5) when students do not attend. Spring Break runs March 22–26, 2027. Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools breaks March 29–April 2 — one week after GCS — so families coordinating between the two districts have no common break window this year. The school year ends June 10, 2027.
